summary: Disambiguate 'semantic model' vs 'dataset' vs 'report' — 'dataset' is the legacy Power BI name for a semantic model; a report is a separate visualization item bound to a semantic model.

meanings.description: The tabular data model (tables, measures, relationships) queried with DAX. Formerly called 'dataset' in Power BI. This is the same item — the name changed.

'Dataset' is the pre-2023 Power BI term for a semantic model. Power BI REST API endpoints still use /datasets. Access them via fabio rest call --api powerbi when a Power BI-specific endpoint is needed.
If the user means visuals/pages/dashboards, that is a Report item bound to a semantic model — a separate artifact from the model itself.

default_action: Treat 'dataset' and 'semantic model' as the same item (use the semantic-model group). Route visualization requests to the report group.
